readinessLanes.name: Knowledge source boundary
readinessLanes.evidence: 252 unique green sources; 0 bad grounding refs.
readinessLanes.blocker: None in current generated grounding report.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Keep running green grounding before and after any evidence changes.

readinessLanes.name: Reviewer execution scaffolding
readinessLanes.evidence: 41 human execution steps; 72 blank note fields.
readinessLanes.blocker: Scaffolding is not real review evidence.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Use the bundle as the human reviewer start page.

readinessLanes.name: Codex self-review notes
readinessLanes.blocker: Self-review is not final human approval.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Use these notes as intake evidence, then require separate human approval review.

readinessLanes.name: Direct source candidates
readinessLanes.blocker: Direct candidates were downgraded or resolved for boundary/context use.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Keep direct evidence claims out of lesson prose until separate approval review.

readinessLanes.name: Evidence intake
readinessLanes.blocker: Candidates still require separate approval review.

readinessLanes.name: Separate approval
readinessLanes.nextAction: A separate human approver must review candidates before any release review.

readinessLanes.name: Release drift guard
readinessLanes.blocker: Passing negative cases prevent drift but do not grant release readiness.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Keep release drift guard passing after any future approval-gate changes.

readinessLanes.name: Internal trial readiness
readinessLanes.blocker: Separate human approval and release-review evidence are still absent.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Complete separate approval before considering internal trial.

readinessLanes.name: Launch readiness
readinessLanes.blocker: The project remains education-only and non-production.
readinessLanes.nextAction: Do not create launch or production claims from generated review scaffolding.

blockers: Codex self-review notes are not final human approval.
12 candidates still need separate human approval review.
No learner-facing release review has been performed.
Release negative cases pass, which confirms drift is blocked rather than readiness granted.
The rewrite workbench remains reviewer-facing structural draft work, not learner-facing final course material.
requiredNextActions: Treat the Codex self-review overlay as intake evidence, not approval.
Run a separate human approval review for the 12 candidate lesson cards.
Re-check source fit, factual claims, copying risk, and boundary wording during that separate review.
Keep every lesson structural_draft until a later release-review process exists.
Keep release readiness negative cases passing after every approval-gate change.
Continue hand-authoring or approving broader structural_draft lessons before any later launch claim.
boundary: This launch readiness dashboard is reviewer-facing operations scaffolding only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, or make the product production-ready.
